org.apache.juneau.http.header.ProxyAuthenticate.Builder

Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.http.header
Next-generation HTTP header implementations.

  • Uses of ProxyAuthenticate.Builder in org.apache.juneau.http.header

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http.header that return ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder.algorithm(String value)
    Sets the algorithm auth-param (rendered as a bare token, unquoted).
    static ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
    ProxyAuthenticate.basic(String realm)
    Creates a ProxyAuthenticate.Builder pre-populated with a Basic challenge for the given realm.
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder.basic(String realm)
    Sets the scheme to Basic and the realm auth-param.
    static ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
    ProxyAuthenticate.bearer()
    Creates a ProxyAuthenticate.Builder pre-populated with a Bearer challenge.
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder.bearer()
    Sets the scheme to Bearer.
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder.charset(String value)
    Sets the charset auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
    static ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
    ProxyAuthenticate.create()
    Creates a new empty ProxyAuthenticate.Builder.
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder.digest()
    Sets the scheme to Digest.
    static ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
    ProxyAuthenticate.digest()
    Creates a ProxyAuthenticate.Builder pre-populated with a Digest challenge.
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder.domain(String... values)
    Sets the domain auth-param to a space-separated, quoted list of URIs.
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder.error(String value)
    Sets the error auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string; RFC 6750 Bearer).
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder.errorDescription(String value)
    Sets the error_description auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string; RFC 6750 Bearer).
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder.nonce(String value)
    Sets the nonce auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder.opaque(String value)
    Sets the opaque auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder.param(String name, String value)
    Generic escape hatch for setting any auth-param by name, rendered as a quoted-string.
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder.qop(String... values)
    Sets the qop auth-param to a comma-separated, quoted list of quality-of-protection tokens.
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder.realm(String value)
    Sets the realm auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder.scheme(String value)
    Sets the authentication scheme (e.g.
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
    ProxyAuthenticate.Builder.stale(boolean value)
    Sets the stale auth-param (rendered as a bare token, unquoted).
